headline: Agentic coding tooling led the month as Moonshot AI shipped the open-source trillion-parameter Kimi K2.7 Code.
body: Tool calling moved up the rotation (momentum 145) alongside a cluster of architecture primitives breaking out, including feed-forward network, softmax, and primitive-action decomposition as new entrants. Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source Mixture-of-Experts coding model with one trillion parameters and a terminal CLI for repository exploration and test execution. Agentic OS frameworks for Claude Code drew attention to skills and memory management, while practitioners debated LLM-driven code generation displacing human review. The AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 ran across three days at Moscone West, and Anthropic accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities.

cited_items.title: Kimi K2.7 Code: THIS is VERY CRAZY MAN!
